description: Assets expected to be sold, converted into cash, or used within one year.
Direct costs related to producing or selling the firm's goods and services.
Depreciation of tangible assets and amortization of intangible assets.
Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization.
Goods and raw materials held by the firm for production or sale.
Profit after expenses and costs have been deducted from revenue.
Money owed to the firm by customers for delivered goods or services.
Market capitalization or market value of the publicly traded company.
Gross sales minus returns, allowances, and discounts.
Total assets owned or controlled by the company.
Debt obligations due after more than one year.
Profit after subtracting costs related to manufacturing and selling.
Short-term obligations due within one year.
Accumulated profits retained in the business after dividends and losses.
Total income from sales before subtracting expenses.
Total debts and obligations owed to outside parties.
Expenses incurred through normal business operations.
